articles.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras namedropped by Oracle, alongside Nvidia and AMD
articles.summary: A Cerebras deal from one of the world's top cloud providers could be a big boon for a company that's trying to hit the public market.

articles.title: Oracle stock jumps 9% on earnings beat and increased guidance as cloud revenue climbs 44%
articles.summary: Oracle boosted its revenue backlog total by $30 billion during the February quarter.

articles.title: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
articles.summary: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

articles.title: Tillis maintains blockade on Fed pick Kevin Warsh over Powell probe
articles.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis met with Federal Reserve chairman nominee Kevin Warsh, who President Donald Trump wants to replace Chair Jerome Powell.

articles.title: Oil retreats even after Energy Secretary wrongly claims Navy escorted tanker through Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: The International Energy Agency will hold an extraordinary meeting on Tuesday to discuss a possible release of emergency stockpiles.
